title: Midnight Garden
description: A vibrant bouquet bursts against a deep crimson-to-purple gradient background, with sunflowers, daisies and roses painted in bold impasto strokes full of joy and energy.

title: Sacred Lotus
description: A stunning white lotus rises boldly against a dramatic crimson background, with gold leaf accents on the stem and thick textured petals rendered in impasto technique — elegant and deeply spiritual.

title: Twilight Meadow
description: Wildflowers dance under a sweeping pastel sky at dusk, with bees and butterflies caught mid-flight above a meadow of lupins, daisies and cosmos in soft dreamlike colours.

title: Hummingbird Sunrise
description: A breathtaking large-scale work featuring a jewel-toned hummingbird hovering over a wildflower meadow beneath an explosive sunrise sky of magenta, orange and violet — pure joy on canvas.

title: Summer Serenade
description: A colourful hummingbird glides through a soft blue sky above a sprawling meadow of white, yellow, pink and purple wildflowers — fresh, light and full of summer calm.

title: Daisies & Foxglove
description: Bold white daisies with golden centres stand proudly against towering deep pink foxgloves and a vivid blue sky — a lush, energetic celebration of the English countryside garden.
